classData.comment: /** @summary Opens/creates the orchestrator sqlite DB via the shared Memory Core schema bootstrap. */
classData.summary: Opens/creates the orchestrator sqlite DB via the shared Memory Core schema bootstrap.
classData.name: initializeDatabaseSelfBootstrap

classData.comment:
/**
 * Resolves a deployment-aware boolean toggle from `AiConfig.orchestrator.localOnly[key]`.
 * `null` or missing keys mean "use the deployment-profile default" (local = enabled,
 * cloud = disabled); explicit `true`/`false` overrides. Missing-key fallback keeps
 * gitignored operator configs safe when a newly tracked template key is introduced.
 *
 * @param {String} key
 * @returns {Boolean}
 */
classData.description: Resolves a deployment-aware boolean toggle from AiConfig.orchestrator.localOnly[key]. null or missing keys mean "use the deployment-profile default" (local = enabled, cloud = disabled); explicit true/false overrides. Missing-key fallback keeps gitignored operator configs safe when a newly tracked template key is introduced.
classData.name: resolveDeploymentEnabled

classData.comment:
/**
 * Resolves a cloud-deployment-aware boolean toggle from `AiConfig.orchestrator.cloudOnly[key]`.
 * Inverse of `resolveDeploymentEnabled`: `null` in cloudOnly means "use the deployment-profile
 * default" (cloud = enabled, local = disabled); explicit `true`/`false` overrides. Used for
 * lanes classified cloud-deployable by the deployment policy (e.g. `tenant-repo-sync`).
 *
 * @param {String} key
 * @returns {Boolean}
 */
classData.description: Resolves a cloud-deployment-aware boolean toggle from AiConfig.orchestrator.cloudOnly[key]. Inverse of resolveDeploymentEnabled: null in cloudOnly means "use the deployment-profile default" (cloud = enabled, local = disabled); explicit true/false overrides. Used for lanes classified cloud-deployable by the deployment policy (e.g. tenant-repo-sync).
classData.name: resolveCloudOnlyEnabled

classData.comment:
/**
 * @summary Neo daemon class for Agent OS maintenance scheduling.
 *
 * The process wrapper lives in `daemon.mjs`; cadence decisions and descriptor
 * dispatch live in `scheduling/*`. This class keeps boot, continuous-daemon
 * supervision, and the timer loop thin.
 *
 * @class Neo.ai.daemons.Orchestrator
 * @extends Neo.core.Base
 * @singleton
 * @see ai/daemons/orchestrator/daemon.mjs
 * @see ai/daemons/orchestrator/scheduling/summary.mjs
 * @see ai/services/memory-core/HealthService.mjs#recordTaskOutcome
 * @see learn/agentos/v13-path.md
 */
classData.summary:
Neo daemon class for Agent OS maintenance scheduling.

The process wrapper lives in `daemon.mjs`; cadence decisions and descriptor
dispatch live in `scheduling/*`. This class keeps boot, continuous-daemon
supervision, and the timer loop thin.
classData.name: Orchestrator

classData.comment: /** @summary Starts the orchestrator timer loop after the wrapper selects this process. */
classData.summary: Starts the orchestrator timer loop after the wrapper selects this process.
classData.name: start

classData.description: Appends a daemon log line to disk and mirrors it to stdout/stderr.
classData.name: writeLog

classData.comment: /** @summary Returns true when the Chroma supervised process exceeds max runtime. */
classData.summary: Returns true when the Chroma supervised process exceeds max runtime.
classData.name: isChromaRecycleDue

classData.comment: /** @summary Resolves true when Chroma's TCP port accepts a connection. */
classData.summary: Resolves true when Chroma's TCP port accepts a connection.
classData.name: probeChromaReady

classData.description: Executes a sweep and schedules the next poll when the daemon remains active.
classData.name: poll
